iotsitewise.project.AssetIds.Docs: A list that contains the IDs of each asset associated with the project.

iotsitewise.project.PortalId.Docs: The ID of the portal in which to create the project.

iotsitewise.project.ProjectName.Docs: A friendly name for the project.

iotsitewise.project.Tags.Docs: A list of key-value pairs that contain metadata for the project. For more information, see [Tagging your AWS IoT SiteWise resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/iot-sitewise/latest/userguide/tag-resources.html) in the *AWS IoT SiteWise User Guide*.
